content:
# Reaction Rate Constant

**Summary**: A constant that relates the rate of a chemical reaction to its concentration and other factors.

---

## How It Appears in the Thesis Collection

- [[2022-alkathim|Alkathim, 2022]] investigated how different reaction rates impacted acid consumption at various injection velocities.

## Scientific Context

- [[2022-alkathim|Alkathim, 2022]] Determines how quickly acid reacts with the rock matrix.

## Measurement and Characterization Methods

- [[2022-alkathim|Alkathim, 2022]] Simulated via two-scale continuum model.

## Key Findings Across Sources

- Lower reaction rate constants result in lower acid consumption at low injection velocities, while higher ones increase it at high velocities. ([[2022-alkathim|Alkathim, 2022, p. 97]])
- [[2022-alkathim|Alkathim, 2022]] Not stated in source.
